3261730.name: Summer Snow Day Demo
3261730.description:
Honji has been accepted to the most prestigious college in the world. To get an edge, he is spending his summer in Kamanori. It's a small town famous for being permanently snowy, and award-winning prep courses. Hopefully nothing goes wrong.

With plans to just put his head down and study, Honji is taken by surprise with all of the colorful and interesting people he meets.

Through your choices, you will guide Honji along his path in Kamanori. But BE WARNED, choices are frequent and will have impact on your relationships.

In addition to your choices, minigames will often pop up and help you gain favor with the people you meet.

In spite of Honji's intent for the summer, romance looms... but at the same time, a series of murders emerge in town. Honji is roped into solving these murders. Can you help him perform the balancing act of playing detective while also navigating love?

Mature Content Warning

The developers describe the content like this:

The game contains violent language, swearing and bloody imagery (rare / in static images)

--------------------------------

Wishlist the game today!
